original_description: Official Boomi Exosphere design system skill. Use for any UI work in a Boomi product or any project that uses the Exosphere design system. MUST trigger on explicit mentions of `@boomi/exosphere`, `ExButton`/`ex-button`/`Ex*`/`ex-*`, Exosphere tokens (`--exo-*`), `exosphere.boomi.com` URLs, Boomi product UI features, Exosphere theming, design-system compliance reviews, token/a11y audits, picking the right component for a UX need, setting up Exosphere in a new React/Angular/Vue/Next app, and extending the system with custom components. ALSO trigger when a user is building UI inside a Boomi codebase even if they do not explicitly name Exosphere — in Boomi projects, Exosphere is the default design system and the skill should be consulted proactively rather than waiting to be invited.
best_description:
Use this skill for any question or task involving Boomi's Exosphere design system. This is the only skill that knows Exosphere — invoke it whenever you see:

- Any identifier starting with `Ex` (e.g. ExButton, ExDialog, ExPill, ExWizard, ExTree, ExCarousel, ExRichTextEditor, ExLeftmenubar*, ExStructuredList*, ExToastController — 70+ components, including unfamiliar Ex* names).
- Any `ex-*` custom element tag like `<ex-button>`, `<ex-badge-group>`, `<ex-alert-banner>`.
- The package `@boomi/exosphere`, `--exo-*` CSS tokens, or `exosphere.boomi.com`.
- UI work inside any Boomi product/codebase (Integration Designer, runtime UI, atom catalog, theming pages) — Exosphere is the default there, trigger even when not named.

Covers: props, events, docs, examples, comparisons ("X vs Y"), loading/responsive/a11y behavior, framework setup (React, Next.js, Angular, Vue), tokens/theming, and picking the right component for a UX need.

When in doubt about an Ex-prefixed name or a Boomi UI task, trigger.
final_description:
Use this skill for any question or task involving Boomi's Exosphere design system. This is the only skill that knows Exosphere — invoke it whenever you see:

- Any identifier starting with `Ex` (e.g. ExButton, ExDialog, ExPill, ExWizard, ExTree, ExCarousel, ExRichTextEditor, ExLeftmenubar*, ExStructuredList*, ExToastController — 70+ components, including unfamiliar Ex* names).
- Any `ex-*` custom element tag like `<ex-button>`, `<ex-badge-group>`, `<ex-alert-banner>`.
- The package `@boomi/exosphere`, `--exo-*` CSS tokens, or `exosphere.boomi.com`.
- UI work inside any Boomi product/codebase (Integration Designer, runtime UI, atom catalog, theming pages) — Exosphere is the default there, trigger even when not named.

Covers: props, events, docs, examples, comparisons ("X vs Y"), loading/responsive/a11y behavior, framework setup (React, Next.js, Angular, Vue), tokens/theming, and picking the right component for a UX need.

When in doubt about an Ex-prefixed name or a Boomi UI task, trigger.

history.description: Official Boomi Exosphere design system skill. Use for any UI work in a Boomi product or any project that uses the Exosphere design system. MUST trigger on explicit mentions of `@boomi/exosphere`, `ExButton`/`ex-button`/`Ex*`/`ex-*`, Exosphere tokens (`--exo-*`), `exosphere.boomi.com` URLs, Boomi product UI features, Exosphere theming, design-system compliance reviews, token/a11y audits, picking the right component for a UX need, setting up Exosphere in a new React/Angular/Vue/Next app, and extending the system with custom components. ALSO trigger when a user is building UI inside a Boomi codebase even if they do not explicitly name Exosphere — in Boomi projects, Exosphere is the default design system and the skill should be consulted proactively rather than waiting to be invited.

history.description:
Use this skill whenever the user mentions, asks about, or works with ANY Exosphere design-system element. Trigger on:

- ANY component name starting with `Ex` (ExButton, ExPill, ExDialog, ExWizard, ExSelect, ExTree, ExFilter, ExCarousel, ExTile, ExRich*, ExLeftmenubar*, ExStructuredList*, etc. — 70+ components; trigger even on unfamiliar Ex* names).
- ANY `ex-*` web-component tag (`<ex-button>`, `<ex-badge-group>`, etc.).
- `@boomi/exosphere`, `--exo-*` tokens, `exosphere.boomi.com`, ExToastController, AI/Discover kits.
- Questions about props, events, docs, examples, loading/responsive/a11y behavior, or "X vs Y — when do I pick which" comparisons for Ex* names.
- Setup in React, Next.js, Angular, or Vue involving Exosphere.
- ANY UI work inside a Boomi product or codebase (Integration Designer, atom catalog, runtime UI) — Exosphere is the default; trigger proactively even if not named.

Err strongly on the side of triggering for any Ex-prefixed identifier or Boomi UI task.
